rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by moving invalid guarantees to valid scopes
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings to existing output features or auxiliary variables
Remove guarantees that reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in type scopes
generic_rules: Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use only visible features or eq helpers in the same annex for guarantees
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scopes
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in type-level contracts
Do not add architecture to fix invalid guarantees
